# 🌅 Morning Digest — Wednesday, April 29, 2026

| Sender | Subject | Urgency | Summary |
|---|---|---|---|
| Lucia Caamano | Re: Detention Prevention — Wave 2 Done and Key Insights | Medium | Lucia is pausing distribution of Wave 2 results — she wants to sync with Daniel first before sharing broadly. **Unread.** |
| Jhara Ochoa | Re: Detention Prevention — Wave 2 Done and Key Insights | Low | Tagged Lucia as FYI on the same thread. Unread. |
| B. Vehonsky | RE: Service Expansion Framework — Finance Assessment - Your Input Needed | Medium | Finance reviewed the Vercel app and notes a key concern: Finance will be heavily dependent on data availability and quality. Input requested. **Unread.** |
| Asana | Wednesday - tasks due soon: 6 | Medium | 6 tasks due soon including User Acceptance Testing (UAT). Worth a quick review. |
| Carlos Soto | Declined: Legal SharePoint repository - mock up review | Medium | Carlos declined today's 12:00 PM SharePoint mock-up meeting. Also messaged on Teams: "Sorry Santi it won't work for me at 1 pm." May need to reschedule or proceed without him. |
| Miro | New activity: 4 boards need your attention | Low | 4 Miro boards have new activity. |

_(Multiple calendar accept/decline notifications for Scam-related initiatives sync-up are noted but require no action.)_

## 💬 Teams — Active Conversations

**Santiago & Jean Garcia (1:1)** — Connector/Microsoft auth issue. Jean explained this happens every ~2 weeks when Microsoft logs them out; fix is to go to the connector and re-grant access. Jean confirmed it is working now and Santiago confirmed. Resolved.

**⭐ Larry Marioth (1:1)** — Larry replied: "Sounds good! Please send me a meeting invite. Danny sent the Analyst role to HR today." **Action needed: send Larry a meeting invite.** Also worth noting — Danny has officially submitted the Analyst role to HR.

**Meeting thread with Jhara Ochoa** — Jhara fixed bugs on the AI/IA project and wants to demo it to Santiago. She asked about sending something to Evan for him to start using (Santiago said go ahead). She is also working on the incubation intake qualification rubric.

**Marketing channel (Katerine Sarantes)** — Marketing received a call asking whether a phone number listed on certain firm pages is officially LLF's. Needs verification — potentially scam/brand-safety related given current project focus.

**Grievances channel** — Santiago weighed in that only the SOP Jessica shared needs to be updated and then followed once a grievance comes in. Thread appears on track pending SOP update.

## ⚡ Immediate Action

Two things deserve first-thing attention:

1. **Send Larry Marioth a meeting invite** — He is waiting on it. He also confirmed Danny submitted the Analyst role to HR today, which is good hiring progress.
2. **Legal SharePoint mock-up review at 12:00 PM** — Carlos declined and confirmed via Teams he cannot make it. Decide now whether to reschedule or proceed with Jhara and F. Amador only.
